modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to view completed classes in DegreeWorks.

full_description_text: The user is trying to find out how to see the classes they have completed in DegreeWorks. They are unsure of the steps needed to access this information. This issue was raised during a live call with the help desk.
short_description: Unable to view completed classes in DegreeWorks.
description: The user is trying to find out how to see the classes they have completed in DegreeWorks. They are unsure of the steps needed to access this information. This issue was raised during a live call with the help desk.
